overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia traversing a snowy mountain landscape. The character ascends stone stairs through a narrow rocky gorge before emerging onto an open ridge with panoramic views of snow-capped peaks, then descends through a forested valley where a deer appears briefly.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered stone stairway through rocky mountain gorge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily up the stone stairs through the narrow rocky passage, with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered in snow forming the left boundary of the gorge
steep rocky cliff face covered in snow forming the right boundary of the gorge
man-made stone stairs ascending through the mountain gorge
broken wooden beams and debris scattered on the left cliff face

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt ascending a narrow snow-covered stone stairway carved through a rocky mountain gorge. Steep cliff walls flank both sides of the path, with broken wooden scaffolding visible on the left. The overcast sky is partially visible above the rocky enclosure as the character steadily climbs upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail opening toward snow-capped peaks

events.description: exits the narrowest section of the gorge into a wider mountain pass with expanding views

agents.ego_description: continuing the ascent along the rocky trail as the terrain gradually opens up, approaching the mountain peak ahead

entered.detail: majestic tall snow-capped mountain peak becoming visible ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: As Geralt leaves the stone stairs behind, the path transitions to a rocky dirt trail winding through a widening mountain pass. The enclosing rock walls recede to the mid-distance while a prominent snow-capped peak emerges into view ahead, dominating the horizon as the character continues the ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with panoramic valley views

events.description: character turns left to look at the expansive valley view behind before continuing along the ridge
transition from enclosed rocky pass to open ridge with full panoramic views of distant mountain ranges

agents.ego_description: walking along the open ridge while surveying the panoramic mountain scenery, occasionally glancing toward the expansive valley views to the left

entered.detail: expansive panoramic view of distant snow-covered mountain ranges and misty valleys below
cluster of evergreen pine trees scattered on the mountainside ahead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open mountain ridge where the terrain opens dramatically to reveal breathtaking panoramic views. To the left, an expansive valley vista stretches toward distant misty peaks, while the path continues along a snow-covered ridge with scattered pine trees visible ahead. The right side features a steep snow-covered cliff face that has drawn closer to the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain valley with snow-covered ground

events.description: entering the tree line of the mountain forest as the path descends toward the valley
a deer briefly appears on the left side among the trees before moving away

agents.ego_description: walking downhill through the snowy forest path, moving steadily toward the valley below while passing through the tree line

notable_agents.action: deer standing briefly among the pine trees on the left before moving away into the forest

entered.detail: thick cluster of evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a forested mountain valley as Geralt descends from the open ridge. Dense pine forests line the left side of the snowy path while rock walls continue on the right. A deer makes a brief appearance among the trees around the 60-second mark, adding wildlife to the serene winter landscape as the journey continues downward through the snow-covered terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a claustrophobic rocky gorge into an expansive mountain vista. It begins with Geralt climbing a narrow, snow-covered stone stairway flanked by steep cliff walls and broken wooden scaffolding under an overcast sky. As the character leaves the stairs behind, the enclosing rock walls gradually recede into the mid-distance, allowing the environment to open up. The scene then shifts to a winding rocky dirt trail that leads through a widening mountain pass. Finally, the horizon expands to reveal a prominent snow-capped peak that dominates the view as the ascent continues.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, exposed mountain ridge into the sheltered depths of a forested valley. It begins as the character emerges onto an open ridge where the terrain opens dramatically to reveal panoramic views of an expansive valley and distant misty peaks. As the path continues along the snow-covered ridge, the camera passes scattered pine trees while a steep cliff face looms closer on the right. The scene then shifts as the character descends from the heights, transitioning into a dense pine forest that lines the left side of the snowy trail. Finally, the journey continues downward through the serene winter landscape, where a deer briefly appears among the trees before the path disappears further into the valley.
